columns.extraction_plan: The document provides median biochemical progression-free survival (bPFS) for the ADT plus D arm as 22.9 months (95% CI, 19.5-28.4) and median radiographic progression-free survival (rPFS) as 22.9 months (95% CI, 20.5-31.4) in the overall population (page 4, text, section 3.2). However, it does not report a "PFS Rate (%)", as a percentage at a specific time point for the treatment arm.

The document provides median biochemical progression-free survival (bPFS) for the ADT arm as 12.9 months (95% CI, 11.9–17.7) and median radiographic progression-free survival (rPFS) as 15.3 months (95% CI, 12.4-19.8) in the overall population (page 4, text, section 3.2). However, it does not report a "PFS Rate (%)", as a percentage at a specific time point for the control arm.
